parameters.query:
SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t.*), '[]'::json) as items FROM (
  SELECT ua.id, b.nama AS nama_barang, b.kodebarang, ua.nomorinventaris, ua.kondisi, ua.statuspinjam, b.foto AS foto_barang,
    (
      SELECT COALESCE(u."username", p.userid)
      FROM "SIMAPO".peminjaman p
      LEFT JOIN public.user_list u ON u."NIP" = p.userid
      WHERE p.unitasetid = ua.id AND p.status = 'DIPINJAM'
      ORDER BY p.createdat DESC LIMIT 1
    ) AS nama_peminjam_saat_ini
  FROM "SIMAPO".unit_aset ua
  JOIN "SIMAPO".barang b ON b.id = ua.barangid
  WHERE ua.qrcode = '{{ ($json.query.q).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY ua.nomorinventaris ASC
) t;

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(t.*), '[]'::json) as items FROM (
  SELECT ua.id, ua.nomorinventaris, ua.kondisi, ua.statuspinjam,
    (
      SELECT COALESCE(u."username", p.userid)
      FROM "SIMAPO".peminjaman p
      LEFT JOIN public.user_list u ON u."NIP" = p.userid
      WHERE p.unitasetid = ua.id AND p.status = 'DIPINJAM'
      ORDER BY p.createdat DESC LIMIT 1
    ) AS nama_peminjam_saat_ini
  FROM "SIMAPO".unit_aset ua
  WHERE ua.barangid = '{{ ($json.query.barangid).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
  ORDER BY ua.nomorinventaris ASC
) t;

UPDATE "SIMAPO".unit_aset SET qrcode = '{{ ($json.body.qrcode).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}', updatedat = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = '{{ ($json.body.id).toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}' RETURNING id, qrcode;
